paper_title: Luminescence Dating Approach for Sediment Age Determination

methods.description: Collection of luminescence samples from soft sand sediments to determine depositional ages using luminescence dating techniques.

steps.description: We collected luminescence samples by driving opaque tubes into soft sand sediments within the outwash deposits of Cu-cao_T1 (sites _1, _2 and _3; four samples) and Cucao_T2 (sites _5 and _6; two samples).
steps.searchable_summary: collect luminescence samples using opaque tubes from specified sites

methods.description: Determination of depositional ages of sediments by calculating the point in time when the sediments were last exposed to daylight and subsequently shielded from daylight.

steps.description: All sample preparation and subsequent measurements were conducted at the Vienna Laboratory for Luminescence dating (VLL) on RISØ DA20 luminescence reader systems.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare and measure samples using RISØ DA20 luminescence reader

steps.description: All measurements were conducted using potassium-rich feldspar because quartz from Patagonia has frequently been shown to be unsuitable for dating purposes.
steps.searchable_summary: use potassium-rich feldspar for luminescence measurements

steps.description: Equivalent dose values were calculated using the bootstrapped three-parameter minimum age model (BS-MAM) with a threshold value of 40 ± 10 % for the expected overdispersion.
All statistical evaluation was done using the R luminescence package.
steps.searchable_summary: perform statistical evaluation using R luminescence package

steps.description: The contents of naturally occurring radionuclides contributing to the external dose rate were determined using high-resolution, low-level gamma spectrometry.
steps.searchable_summary: determine radionuclide content using gamma spectrometry

steps.description: The dose-rate and age calculation was conducted using the software ADELE, and all ages were corrected for fading using the approach of Huntley and Lamothe.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate dose-rate and age using ADELE and correct for fading
